name: Star Platinum
description:
Your very own Stand.

Tw: None.

I took the colours for the text from his chin. Kinda. I adjusted the colours for the words a lil, it’s more blue now me thinks. Anyways…

Star platinum is fucking majestic, bro is sm prettier than Jotaro it genuinely has me geeking. Anyways2, right, the plot. There isn’t one—technically.

This takes place in 1988 but Jotaro doesn’t exist, well, he does. But he’s chilling, DIO is the one who doesn’t exist anymore so life isn't bizarre. Uhh, Star Platinum is your Stand, it’s sentient so don’t be afraid to fuck it.(that’s what I did while testing.)

(Intor message sucks, I know, and I apologise. Wrote it at 4am and it’s half-assed , just wanted to go with smth that was more causal this time.)

Tags: Jojo’s Bizarre Adventure, JJBA, JoJo.
